---
title: "Surveillance Outputs"
format: html
---

This section brings together BNR surveillance outputs, including short briefings, longer reports, data tables, dashboards, and future primary care surveillance products.

The first build priority is cardiovascular disease surveillance, using a Stata-first workflow where approved outputs are generated into the `outputs/public/` folder and then published through Quarto.

## Current surveillance areas

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### [Cardiovascular disease](cvd/index.qmd)

Cardiovascular disease surveillance outputs, including case counts, incidence, mortality, case-fatality, and related public-facing summaries.

**Status:** Active build area

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### [CVD briefings](cvd/briefings/index.qmd)

Short, plain-language briefing products designed for public, clinical, and policy audiences.

**First pilot:** Simple CVD case counts

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### [CVD reports](cvd/reports/index.qmd)

Longer reports that bring together narrative interpretation, tables, figures, methods, and downloadable outputs.

**Status:** Planned

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### [CVD data tables](cvd/data-tables/index.qmd)

Approved data tables generated from Stata outputs and prepared for publication.

**Status:** Planned after first pilot

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### [Dashboards](../dashboards/index.qmd)

Static or pre-rendered dashboard products built from approved aggregate outputs.

**Status:** Future enhancement

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### [Downloads](../downloads/index.qmd)

Approved downloadable outputs, including public tables, figures, reports, and release documentation.

**Status:** To be linked to release catalogue

:::
:::
:::

:::

## Future surveillance areas

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### [Primary care surveillance](primary-care/index.qmd)

Future surveillance outputs for defined primary care domains, beginning with hypertension and diabetes.

**Status:** Planned under Phase 2

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### [Archive](../archive/index.qmd)

Older outputs and historical releases retained for transparency and continuity.

**Status:** Planned

:::
:::
:::

:::

## Publication principle

Surveillance pages should publish or explain approved outputs generated by the compute layer.

The basic workflow is:

**Stata scripts → approved output bundle → Quarto publication page**

Quarto pages should not contain hidden analytical logic that replaces the Stata workflow.
